short_description: EPSILON-AETHER: Riemannian-Sphere Sphere Embedding + S^31 JL-Projected Sparse Attention + Thermodynamic LR + 12L GPT
notes: Unified Epsilon-Aether engine. Uses Riemannian Manifold optimization for embeddings, O(32*N) JL-projected attention scoring, and Thermodynamic Gibbs-entropy adaptive LR. Proven Lyapunov stability for sparsity control.
